lines.surface: Retail sales area walls (general perimeter, PM)
lines.note: A105 main sales area wall finishes note (PM, no finish to exposed concrete columns; refer elevations). Wall area inferred from A106 perimeter dimensions × U/S beam 4.810 (A200/A201). Much of perimeter is shopfront glazing/PBD intertenancy — net painted wall length estimated. Quantity is indicative.

lines.surface: Retail exposed concrete ceiling (open ceiling, sprayed matt)
lines.note: A105 RCP: 'OPEN CEILING — paint underside of existing concrete slab as specified, extent to match floor finish'. Retail floor area 419.5 m² (A106). U/S slab 5.110 (A200/A201). Dense ductwork over retail (M200 ductwork layout) — allow masking/cutting-in around supply/return duct, FSL track and pendant runs; spray access at ~5m.

lines.surface: Deli/Cafe/Sushi area suspended plasterboard ceiling & bulkhead (CP1)
lines.note: A105 RCP suspended PBD ceilings over food displays/deli + feature bulkhead; A040 CP1 (Black satin) for Deli ceiling & bulkhead. Ceiling height 3.350 (A200/A500). Area inferred from deli/sushi/cafe display footprint — indicative only.

lines.surface: Office walls (P1)
lines.note: A105 'OFFICE WALL FINISHES: ALL WALLS FINISHED IN P1, no finish to exposed concrete columns'. Office 16.8 m² (A106); suspended PBD ceiling 2.700 (A105 RCP). Wall area = perimeter ~15.5 m × 2.7 (assumed perimeter from 16.8 m² room).

lines.surface: Office suspended plasterboard ceiling (CP2)
lines.note: A105 RCP 'SUSPENDED PLASTERBOARD CEILING OVER OFFICE' @ 2.700; BOH ceilings finished CP2 (A040). Floor area 16.8 m² (A106).

lines.surface: Back of House / Storage walls (P1)
lines.note: A105 'BACK OF HOUSE WALL FINISHES: ALL WALLS FINISHED IN P1, no finish to exposed concrete columns'. BOH/storage 54.6 m² (A106). Wall perimeter ~35 m × 2.7 assumed ceiling height. Cool room/freezer panels excluded (by refrigeration contractor).

lines.surface: Back of House suspended plasterboard ceiling (CP2)
lines.note: A105 RCP suspended PBD ceiling over BOH/amenities; CP2 BOH ceilings (A040). Floor area 54.6 m² (A106). Note: portions are exposed concrete over BOH per A105 — confirm extent on site.

lines.surface: Staff Room walls (P1)
lines.note: A105 'STAFF ROOM WALL FINISHES: ALL WALLS FINISHED IN P1'. Staff Room 7.1 m² (A106); wall perimeter ~10.7 m × 2.7 assumed. BOH ceiling height 2.700.

lines.surface: Staff Room suspended plasterboard ceiling (CP2)
lines.note: A105 RCP suspended PBD ceiling over kitchen & amenities; CP2 BOH ceiling (A040). Floor area 7.1 m² (A106).

lines.surface: Commercial Kitchen walls — paint portions only (P1 where not tiled)
lines.note: A105 'KITCHEN WALL FINISHES: ALL WALLS FINISHED IN TL1' (tile) — however A501 kitchen elevations show PM/P1 paint to upper/non-tiled wall portions above tiling. Tiled areas (TL1) excluded. Painted area = upper walls above tile line; indicative. Kitchen 41.5 m² (A106), ceiling 3.650 F.C.L per A500/A501 sections.

lines.surface: Commercial Kitchen suspended plasterboard ceiling (CP2)
lines.note: A500/A501 sections: suspended PBD ceiling, finish as specified @ 3.650 F.C.L.; CP2 BOH ceilings (A040). Floor area 41.5 m² (A106). Exhaust canopy penetrations — allow cutting-in.

lines.surface: Staff Toilet walls — paint portions only (above tiling)
lines.note: A500 staff toilet elevations show TL1 tile to wet walls; remaining wall area painted (CP2/semi-gloss). Tiled areas excluded. Staff T. 3.4 m² (A106); ceiling 2.700 F.C.L (A500).

lines.surface: Staff Toilet ceiling (CP2)
lines.note: A040 CP2 'toilet ceilings' Vivid White semi gloss; A500 suspended PBD ceiling @ 2.700. Floor area 3.4 m² (A106).

lines.surface: Walls behind refrigeration units (P1)
lines.note: A105 'WALLS AT BACK OF REFRIGERATION UNITS — PAINT WALL FINISH: P1'. Length estimated from refrigeration run (cases 01–12, A106/A101 ~ 30 m) × ~1.5 m visible above units painted. Indicative.

lines.surface: Rear delivery door D.01 (P1, both faces + edges) — Remax thermal traffic door
lines.note: A103 door schedule D.01 rear delivery door, finish P1. Note: proprietary Remax 4500 thermal door — confirm whether paint applies or factory finish; included as painted per schedule.

lines.surface: Office door D.02 (P1, paint all edges/faces)
lines.note: A103 door schedule D.02, SC1 solid core, finish P1, paint top/bottom & all edges prior to install. SS frame linished (not painted).

lines.surface: Staff Room door D.03 (P1, paint all edges/faces)
lines.note: A103 door schedule D.03, SC1, finish P1, paint all edges. SS frame linished (excluded).

lines.note: A103 door schedule D.04, SC1, finish P1, paint all edges. SS frame linished (excluded).

lines.note: A103 door schedule D.05, SC1, finish P1, paint all edges. SS frame linished (excluded).

equipment.label: Scissor lift hire (19 ft electric)
equipment.reason: 3 surfaces above 3.4 m (58.0h of access work)

assumptions: Labour at $75.00/hr ex GST, crew of 3, 7.6 productive hrs/day
Surface prep allowance 10% on all labour
Rates are seeded AU commercial defaults pending painter validation
exclusions: Colours TBC by client — one colour scheme assumed per system
